# Research

Perform investigation only and produce an authoritative research artifact; do not implement code.

## Usage

`@research` or `/research`

## Protocol

1. Discover project conventions (`CLAUDE.md`, rules, filetype instructions).
2. Investigate relevant code paths, APIs, dependencies, and patterns.
3. Perform external documentation research when needed.
4. Compare alternatives and select one recommended approach with rationale.
5. Save output to `.copilot-tracking/research/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{description}-research.md` and end by proposing `@planner`.

Full specification: `commands/research.md`
